description: Candid photograph, not a designed graphic. It shows a white crew-cab pickup truck off a wooded roadway against a tree, with front-end and side damage. An orange and red light bar from another vehicle is visible behind it. To the right of the truck, a man stands facing the vehicle; he wears a black t-shirt, khaki tactical pants, sneakers, and blue nitrile gloves. The setting is a tree-lined two-lane road with a metal guardrail; lighting is daylight. There is no on-image text, no agency seal or logo, no headline, slogan, or graphic typography overlaid. The photo accompanies a tweet about ICE Philadelphia officers rescuing a driver from a crashed vehicle and extinguishing an engine fire on July 11.
